core_mechanism: a two-sample hypothesis test that uses the asymptotic chi-square null distribution of an information-theoretic divergence statistic between two empirical distributions, with a critical-value threshold and an explicit Type I error vs. statistical-power trade-off
brief_reason: The abstract derives statistical properties and chi-square benchmark values for divergence measures, establishes that these divergences follow chi-square distributions under the null, and evaluates them by Type I error control and statistical power for detecting distributional shifts.
